title: Phlebotomy Technician
description:
Abbott is a diversified global healthcare company with leading diagnostics, medical devices, and nutrition franchises serving patients worldwide.

We're seeking a Phlebotomy Technician to join our Medical Devices team in Irvine. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Perform blood draws using proper phlebotomy techniques and infection control standards
Ensure specimen collection, labeling, and handling comply with laboratory standards
Interact professionally with patients to ease discomfort and address concerns
Maintain accurate records of specimens and testing results
Maintain equipment, supplies, and clean work environment
Follow OSHA and CLIA regulations for bloodborne pathogen safety

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; phlebotomy certification required
requirements.experience_years: 0-2 years of phlebotomy or laboratory specimen collection experience
